name: io.github.speakai/mcp-server
title: Speak AI
description: Connect AI assistants to Speak AI for transcription, AI insights, and media management

environmentVariables.name: SPEAK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Speak AI API key. Generate one at https://speakai.co/connect.

environmentVariables.name: SPEAK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Speak AI API base URL. Defaults to https://api.speakai.co.
